text:
1. AUTO-RENEWAL
This agreement shall automatically renew for successive one-year terms unless cancelled in writing.

2. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
In no event shall the company be liable for indirect or consequential damages.

3. ARBITRATION
All disputes shall be resolved through binding arbitration. You waive your right to sue in court or participate in a class action.

4. DATA SHARING
We may share your personal information with third-party advertising partners.

5. CHANGES TO TERMS
We reserve the right to modify this agreement at any time at our sole discretion without prior notice.

6. EARLY TERMINATION
An early termination fee of 3 months remaining balance will apply if cancelled before contract end.

7. PRICE ADJUSTMENT
Prices are subject to change and may increase annually.

8. GOVERNING LAW
This agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware.

9. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
The company retains an irrevocable, royalty-free license to all content you create on the platform.

10. NOTICE PERIOD
Either party must provide 90 days written notice before cancellation.
